mapper.select: SELECT id, result_id, task_item_id, item_id, item_name, item_type, asset_id, asset_name, asset_code, check_value, standard_value, is_normal, abnormal_desc, remark, check_time, longitude, latitude, deleted, create_time, update_time FROM inspection_result_item WHERE result_id = #{resultId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO inspection_result_item (result_id, task_item_id, item_id, item_name, item_type, asset_id, asset_name, asset_code, check_value, standard_value, is_normal, abnormal_desc, remark, check_time, longitude, latitude, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.resultId}, #{item.taskItemId}, #{item.itemId}, #{item.itemName}, #{item.itemType}, #{item.assetId}, #{item.assetName}, #{item.assetCode}, #{item.checkValue}, #{item.standardValue}, #{item.isNormal}, #{item.abnormalDesc}, #{item.remark}, #{item.checkTime}, #{item.longitude}, #{item.latitude}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime})
